title: Marcus The Worm
description: Marcus The Worm as Enderman new Enderman texture and new Enderman sounds Powerd by AgnteEnte
body:
# Marcus The Worm replaces the Enderman with Marcus — the legendary worm-meme who absolutely did not ask to be here.
Instead of creepy teleport sounds, Marcus now screams iconic meme lines and makes you question your life choices.
Zero lore. Zero seriousness. Pure worm energy.

**Features:** 
- New Enderman texture (now a majestic worm)
- Replaces Enderman sounds with dumb meme quotes
- No gameplay changes — only brain-cell reduction

_This pack exists because it could, not because it should._

_Powerd by AgnteEnte_
